case_title: UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIF. CORPORATION vs. SANGCO, FELIXANDER et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIF. CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SANGCO, FELIXANDER DOES ONE THROUGH FIVE, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-29-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-28-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-09-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-29-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-29-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OCS WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FTA, FTC. HEARING SET FOR APR-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

parties.name: UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIF. CORPORATION
